data.title: Mirasol Resources plans private placement financing of up to 6.7M Units at $0.45 each, aiming for $3M gross proceeds.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Mirasol Resources Ltd. disclosed plans for a non-brokered private placement financing, termed the "Offering." The company aims to offer up to 6,666,667 Units at $0.45 per Unit, totaling $3.0 million in gross proceeds. Each Unit consists of one common share and half a non-transferable common share purchase warrant (the "Warrant"), where a whole Warrant allows the holder to buy an extra common share at $0.60 within twelve months from the Offering's closure. Mirasol Resources Ltd. is listed as TSX-V: MRZ and OTC: MRZLF.

data.title: OpenSolar raises $20m to expand AI tech for 25,000+ solar installers globally. Aim: accelerate energy transition.
data.description: OpenSolar has revealed plans to expand their technology investment in artificial intelligence (AI) to aid solar installers worldwide and speed up the energy transition. The San Francisco-based company, currently catering to over 25,000 solar installer businesses across 160 nations, made this announcement on October 2, 2025.

data.title: OpenText to sell non-core unit for $163 million, accelerating strategy. Reached definitive agreement.
data.description: Open Text Corporation, a prominent player in secure information management for AI, has disclosed a pivotal transaction on Oct. 2, 2025. The corporation, listed on NASDAQ as OTEX and TSX as OTEX, has finalized an agreement that aligns with its strategy of divesting non-core operations. This move comes as part of the company's commitment to optimize its portfolio.

data.title: Bitcoin price surpasses $120k, up 150% for crypto stock Bakkt amid government shutdown.
data.description: The prices of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies are on the rise despite a government shutdown. Bakkt is making significant strides with its transformation and streamlining endeavors. Bitcoin has reached a 2-month high, surpassing $120,000, while a particular cryptocurrency stock has surged by an impressive 150%.

data.title: Faraday Future accelerates smart green mobility in Middle East with UAE partnerships at WETEX 2025, targeting Net Zero 2050.
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) recently took part in WETEX 2025 from September 30 to October 2 at the Dubai World Trade Centre, by invitation of the organizer Dubai Electricity and Water Authority (DEWA). During the event, Faraday Future discussed potential collaborations in line with the UAE’s Net Zero 2050 Strategy and Clean Energy 2050 Strategy, aiming to advance their Middle East Third Pole Strategy. This initiative aims to promote environmentally friendly and sustainable mobility solutions in the region, in efforts to create a smarter, greener tomorrow.

data.title: NY state senator suggests taxing crypto mining energy use based on kilowatt-hours consumed, implementing tiered system.
data.description: An upcoming legislative proposal in New York is set to implement a tiered tax system for energy consumption by cryptocurrency miners. Under this system, miners will be charged based on the number of kilowatt-hours they use.

data.title: Family suing Tesla after college student died in Cybertruck fire, claiming faulty doors hindered her escape.
data.description: A lawsuit alleges that a college student was unable to escape a burning Cybertruck due to its electronic doors, resulting in a dangerous situation. The incident involved the student being trapped inside the vehicle as a fire broke out, causing difficulty in both self-evacuation and rescue efforts. The lawsuit claims that the design of the electronic doors hindered the student's ability to exit the vehicle promptly, leading to a potentially life-threatening situation. The legal action highlights the dangers posed by such mechanisms in emergency situations and seeks to address this issue. The exact number of the student or the specific location of the incident has not been mentioned in the provided information.

data.title: OpenAI surpasses SpaceX, now valued at $500B due to employee share sale amid AI investment boom.
data.description: OpenAI's valuation has reached $500 billion due to a recent employee share sale, reflecting the increasing investor excitement in artificial intelligence. This surge highlights the growing interest in the sector, with the company now valued at half a trillion dollars.

data.title: Vergent LMS in Miss. names Devin Congdon Senior Systems Administrator to boost cloud security for lending platform.
data.description: In Ridgeland, Mississippi, Vergent LMS has named Devin Congdon as the new Senior Systems Administrator, aiming to boost cloud security and scalability for its lending platform. This move is expected to bring significant improvements to the company's technology infrastructure.

data.title: PVAMU's 'PV Cares' program offers holistic support to undergrads with advisors, career coaches, and financial counselors.
data.description: Prairie View A&M University in Texas offers a comprehensive support system to all undergraduate students, including advisors, career coaches, and financial counselors. Through the PV Cares program, launched in October 2025, every student at PVAMU receives personalized assistance to enhance their academic and professional journey. This initiative aims to equip students with the necessary resources and guidance to ensure their long-term success.

data.title: Graves' Orbitopathy market will grow at 19.8% CAGR from 2025-2034. TEPEZZA is the only approved therapy showing significant clinical improvements. New therapies in late-stage development.
data.description: The market for Graves' orbitopathy is currently experiencing fast-paced evolution due to progress in targeted treatments. TEPEZZA (teprotumumab-trbw) stands out as the sole approved therapy, delivering notable clinical benefits and improving the overall quality of life for patients. There are a number of new therapies in late-stage development that show promise for further advancing treatment options in this market segment.

data.title: Emeren Group cancels and reschedules extraordinary general meeting. Date: Oct. 2, 2025. Company: Emeren (NYSE: SOL).
data.description: Today, in Norwalk, Connecticut, Emeren Group Ltd, a prominent global solar and storage project developer, owner, and operator, revealed that its exceptional general meeting set to take place has been rescheduled. The Company, listed on NYSE as SOL, is recognized for its innovative work in the renewable energy sector.
FAA updates helicopter routes, zones at DCA, IAD and BWI: statement

data.title: Big 5 Sporting Goods merges with Worldwide Golf and Capitol Hill Group, becoming wholly owned subsidiary.
data.description: In El Segundo, California, and Bethesda, Maryland, on October 02, 2025, Big 5 Sporting Goods Corporation (Nasdaq: BGFV), a prominent sporting goods retailer, confirmed the finalization of its merger with a consortium consisting of Worldwide Golf and Capitol Hill Group. Following the fulfillment of standard closing prerequisites, which involved the endorsement of Big 5's shareholders, the merger concluded. Big 5 emerged from the merger as a wholly owned subsidiary of the aforementioned partnership.

data.title: Synthetic tokens rise with stablecoins as market cap grows. Sui joins with backed token and synthetic dollar, boosting synthetic finance popularity.
data.description: Sui has recently joined the competition among stablecoins by introducing a fully backed token and a synthetic dollar. They are utilizing delta-neutral hedging in this venture, which has been gaining popularity in the realm of synthetic finance. This move comes as more players enter the market, with a significant rise in interest for stablecoins and innovative financial strategies.

data.title: Mistral Inc. and Uvision Inc. secure $982M contract with US Army for HERO 120 Loitering Munition.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on October 2, 2025, Mistral Inc., a prominent supplier of cutting-edge defense systems, revealed a partnership with Uvision Inc. (previously UVision USA). The U.S. Army has granted them a multi-year Indefinite Delivery, Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract worth a significant amount.
Trump – Pledge Includes Cap On International Students And Speech Restrictions – Globe

data.title: GDIT wins $1.25B contract to support US Army Europe and Africa with AI/ML, cybersecurity, cloud computing, and data analytics.
data.description: In Falls Church, Virginia on October 2, 2025, it was revealed that General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT), a segment of General Dynamics (NYSE:GD), will utilize artificial intelligence/machine learning, cybersecurity, cloud computing, and data analytics technologies to boost operational preparedness. The company plans to harness these capabilities to enhance their services.

data.title: CarMax, Inc. faces investor scrutiny after $142 million loss provision, shares drop 20%.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in San Francisco, CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) experienced a significant sell-off as its stock dropped almost 20% on September 25, 2025, after the unveiling of its second-quarter 2026 financial performance. The unexpected increase in... led to this decline, surprising shareholders and causing a notable impact on the company's stock value.
